parameters.name: group
parameters.label: Group
parameters.description: This field allows you to specify the group that you would like to trim. You can select the group from the pop-up menu, or specify a points and primitives range.

parameters.name: individual
parameters.label:
** (`optype`) - Type: ParMenu
The types of trimming operations available.

**Process Profiles Individually
parameters.description: When this option is off, the trim loops in the group (or all the loops on the surfaces if no group has been specified) will be considered together to form a region. It will report the first region tha

parameters.name: bigloop
parameters.label: Build outer Trim-Loop Explicitly
parameters.description: This option allows you to specify that an outer trim loop be built. It is useful where you have more than one profile curve on the surface and are performing several successive trim operations involvi

parameters.name: trimtol
parameters.label: Trimming Tolerance
parameters.description: How close two trim curves must be to each other or to the edge of the patch in order to be considered an intersection.

parameters.name: altitude
parameters.label: Altitude
parameters.description: You can specify the altitude of the trim. The variable is the surface's current altitude. This marks the transition for the surface from trimmed in to trimmed out.
